items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has the ability to knock out Chase Hooper if the fight remains a kickboxing match.
items.quote: if Ramirez is able to stay safe and not get his back, let's say it turns into a kickbox if I I don't see why he couldn't knock Chase Hooper out.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a significant grappling advantage over Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: Chase Hooper should be able to outgrapple him pretty handily here, dude.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez lacks significant punching power.
items.quote: it's not like Ramirez has a lot of punching power

items.claim: Chase Hooper has demonstrated a tendency to fold under pressure in past fights.
items.quote: I've seen Chase Hooper fold pretty hard twice now.

items.claim: Chase Hooper possesses high-level jiu-jitsu skills, specifically arm bars and triangles.
items.quote: He's so nasty. He's got good arm bars, good triangles.

items.claim: Some of Chase Hooper's past wins have not aged well.
items.quote: Some of his wins haven't even aged that well
